title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.280 - Failure to execute warrant — penalty
text:
58.280.  Failure to execute warrant — penalty. — Any sheriff failing to execute such warrant or to return the same shall forfeit and pay the sum of eight dollars.
(RSMo 1939 § 13233, A.L. 1945 p. 990) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11614; 1919 § 5922; 1909 § 2927
